title: Undertale Last Breath Totem
description: Totems of Undying themed after Sans in the Undertale fangame "Undertale Last Breath"
body:
# A resource pack that adds Sans totems into the game.

This resource pack was (almost) entirely made by me (read the credits.txt file in the pack for more information).

This pack has CIT features! These only work from 1.21.5 onward!

This pack adds totems themed after Sans' phases in the Undertale fangame "[Undertale Last Breath](https://gamejolt.com/games/ULB/424292)".

View all the available phases in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undertale-last-breath-totem/gallery) tab!
